headlines.title: The Dan Sullivan saga in the Alaska Senate race is under investigation, sources say
headlines.description: The Dan Sullivan saga in the Alaska Senate race is under investigation, sources say

headlines.title: Babies born this year to receive ‘Freedom 250’ Social Security cards, Trump administration says
headlines.description: Babies born in the U.S. this week through the end of the year will receive a Social Security card bearing the Freedom 250 logo to commemorate the nation’s 250th anniversary, the Trump administration announced Wednesday.

headlines.title: Trump Made 327 Stock Trades 1 Day Before Tariff Pause: Filings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is back in Washington after his inaugural flight on board the controversial new Air Force One that was gifted by the government of Qatar. It comes as an NBC News review of the president’s 900-plus financial disclosure revealed more than 300 stock trades made just a day before his administration paused several key tariffs. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump makes first trip on new Air Force One
headlines.description: President Trump traveled to North Dakota on board a new Air Force One aircraft, which was a gift from Qatar. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Trump discusses SCOTUS decisions on birthright citizenship and presidential power
headlines.description: While delivering remarks at the opening ceremony of the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library in North Dakota, President Trump discussed the Supreme Court decisions on presidential power and birthright citizenship.

headlines.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag
headlines.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

headlines.title: America at 250 is riven with doubt and pessimism — but with glimmers of hope
headlines.description: Americans have a bleak outlook on the nation’s future ahead of its 250th birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and a record-low number saying they are extremely proud to be Americans, according to a new NBC News poll

headlines.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event
headlines.description: Trump kicked off the event with a headlining speech Wednesday after musical acts dropped out of the lineup citing concerns over partisanship.

headlines.title: Americans believe they aren’t being taught enough about democracy
headlines.description: For Thomas Jefferson, James Madison and other bold-face names struggling to bring about a new nation, an educated and informed citizenry was essential to the success of the American experiment.

headlines.title: Americans see a huge divide between haves and have-nots, new poll shows
headlines.description: A national NBC News poll finds 81% of Americans say there is more that divides than unites the wealthy and ordinary working people.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Paramedics responded to a ‘cardiac arrest’ at Mitch McConnell’s home on day of hospitalization
headlines.description: Paramedics conducted CPR on an individual experiencing a “cardiac arrest” at a known address for Sen.
